reason: Backend layer entry point for route/usecase/model/database changes.
Notification records require app DB schema, seed SQL, UUID v7 IDs, indexes, and migration rules.
Internal notification list API must use route-local DTOs, envelope responses, pagination, and safe errors.
Usecase validation for notification type filters must return typed safe errors.
Notification record IDs and seed dictionary IDs should follow UUID v7 convention.
Notification center page should follow existing Svelte routing, API helper, filter, pagination, and build conventions.
Feature spans DB, model, usecase, route, frontend API, and Svelte page.
